title: kernel/voteの開発状況を調べて、残タスクを教えて
summary_text: **Findings** - Medium: shared matrix builder still carries `codex_main_model=gpt-5.4` as its raw default, which conflicts with the stated live/local philosophy that main should default to `gpt-5-codex`. The drift is in [build-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L16), [build-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L71), [build-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L235), while the current regression only checks non-main codex lanes and implementation uplift, not main-model default, in [test-build-agent-matrix-defaults.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/tests/test-build-agent-matrix-defaults.sh#L46). - Medium: the Tutti router’s risk-policy prepass still tells `workflow-risk-policy.sh` that `has-implement=false`, even when `implementation_phase=true`. That means implementation-phase-aware risk shaping is not fully propagated into matrix resolution. The mismatch is in [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1586). **What Is Correct** - The core `kernel` philosophy is present and explicit: 6+ concurrent lanes, bootstrap-first, no single-lane collapse, and live lane manifest, in [kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L16) and [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/CODEX.md#L42). - The core `/vote` philosophy is also implemented as a local continuation contract rather than GitHub side effects, in [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/CODEX.md#L46) and [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/README.md#L66). - The quorum philosophy is now materially enforced: `codex + claude + glm` baseline trio is a hard gate without Claude waiver in [aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L201). - Planning and implementation diversity are concretized in policy: requirements/planning on `kernel` must preserve `codex + claude + glm`, and implementation phase must keep codex multi-agent, GLM, and bounded Claude teams, in [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/AGENTS.md#L137) and [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/AGENTS.md#L141). - Those rules are reflected in runtime topology: implementation phase auto-lifts mode, forces dual main signal, prevents `GLM without Claude`, and preserves bounded Claude participation in [build-agent-matrix.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/lib/build-agent-matrix.sh#L261), [resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L588), [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1655), and [claude-teams-policy.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/lib/claude-teams-policy.sh#L124). - Visibility is now real, not implicit: planned diversity is announced in the caller and observed diversity is printed in integrated/local summaries, in [fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml#L262), [generate-tutti-comment.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/generate-tutti-comment.sh#L80), and [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh#L1045). **Verdict** `kernel/vote` の設計思想は、現状かなり高い精度で具現化されています。特に「多レーン前提」「`/vote` のローカル継続性」「`codex + claude + glm` の baseline trio」「implementation phase での bounded Claude + GLM + codex-multi-agent」「可視化」は、仕様文言ではなく実装と gate に落ちています。 ただし、完全一致とはまだ言いません。残るズレは 2 点です。`build-agent-matrix.sh` の main model raw...
